economic_notes: Daxet Development Corporation (100% owned), Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20% owned), BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP (cost basis), Qemqomet Development Limited Partnership (99.99% owned, operating as CEK SNANET CENTER). Business operations under Daxet moved to Qemqomet Development LP starting January 2022.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to unavailability of financial information for Qemqomet Development Limited Partnership (CEK SNANET CENTER) for the period January 1 to March 31, 2022. Daxet Development Corporation fiscal year end changed from March 31 to December 31; CRA approval pending at audit date. Capital projects expenses of $45,100 are included in total expenses. Restricted cash includes CMHC Operating ($283,897), CMHC Replacement reserve ($253,781), and CMHC Operating reserve ($142,515). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Federal Other + Provincial = 2,677,134 + 90,051 + 2,517,517 + 533,288.
